topics.title: Columbus Day and Baseball Rivalries
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on Columbus Day history, the legalities of self-defense in a recent physical altercation involving a guest, and the ongoing rivalry between the New York Yankees and the Mets.

topics.title: Radio Industry Rumors and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential return of radio host Howard Stern, the career shifts of Dennis Miller, and recent celebrity news involving Pam Anderson.

topics.title: Movie Stars and Craigslist Dating
topics.summary: The studio discusses a star-studded film screening involving Benicio del Toro and John Voight before transitioning to a humorous analysis of a woman's Craigslist post seeking a wealthy husband.

topics.title: Haunted Houses and Wedding Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses the thrills of haunted houses, experiences with alcohol on airplanes, and potential changes to upcoming wedding plans.

topics.title: Howard Stern's Book Anniversary and Tour Highlights
topics.summary: The studio reflects on the 14th anniversary of Howard Stern's book release while discussing tour experiences with Artie Lange and JD, including a segment featuring a caller reporting an intruder.

topics.title: Adult Film Star Interviews
topics.summary: The studio reviews interviews with various adult film stars regarding their experiences, personal preferences, and specific scenes they have performed or refused.

topics.title: Kid Rock Discusses Marriage to Pam Anderson
topics.summary: The studio features Kid Rock recounting his brief marriage to Pam Anderson, detailing the financial pressures of her career, their shared history in Detroit, and a physical confrontation with Tommy Lee at an awards show.

topics.title: Kid Rock's Divorce and Conflict with Tommy Lee
topics.summary: The studio features Kid Rock discussing his divorce from Pam Anderson, a physical altercation with Tommy Lee over a chair, and the details of his new album.

topics.title: Kid Rock Album Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features Kid Rock discussing his new album, "Rock-and-Roll Jesus," his past as a crack dealer, and his experiences performing for troops in Iraq.

topics.title: Crackhead Bob's Departure from the Show
topics.summary: The studio records a final appearance by Crackhead Bob, who announces his departure from the show and his move to Texas due to high living costs.

topics.title: Crackhead Bob's Farewell to the Show
topics.summary: The studio bids farewell to a regular caller known as Crackhead Bob, who is moving to Texas and receives parting gifts including a stiletto and a cash prize.

topics.title: Farewell to Bob and Merle Haggard Discussion
topics.summary: The studio bids farewell to a regular caller named Bob who is moving to Texas before transitioning into a discussion about country music legend Merle Haggard's new song and his history.

topics.title: Beetlejuice's Behavior and New York Women Survey
topics.summary: The studio discusses the erratic behavior of a performer named Beetlejuice, reports on various entertainment news items including Kid Rock and a new film featuring a doll, and reviews survey results regarding the sexual habits of women in New York.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Sports Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including celebrity news regarding Lindsay Lohan, Britney Spears, and Pam Anderson, as well as sports updates on the New York Yankees and upcoming football games.

topics.title: Vandalism of a Monet Painting
topics.summary: The studio reports on the destruction of a French masterpiece at the Orsay Museum and discusses various news items including athlete doping scandals, local crime, and upcoming entertainment events.
